zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Borwin I於1150年之前出生時，他的父親Pribislav of Mecklenburg30歲，母親Wojsława Gryfita30歲。他於1166年與Adelaide結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1227年1月28日，埋葬在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗多藍納 明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich Borwin I于1150年之前出生时，他的父亲Pribislav of Mecklenburg30岁，母亲Wojsława Gryfita30岁。他于1166年与Adelaide结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1227年1月28日，埋葬在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗多藍納 明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Borwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (North Yorkshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English corduan, cordewan ‘leather from Cordova’, made of goatskin and typically used in making shoes. Compare Cordner .

variants.name: Cordner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Michel.

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): from Middle English and Older Scots cordewaner, cordener, cordiner, Anglo-Norman French cordewaner (Old French cordoanier) ‘worker in Cordovan (Spanish) leather’, a product made from goatskin, typically used in making soft shoes.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Borwin I was born before 1150, his father, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, was 30 and his mother, Wojsława Gryfita, was 30. He married Adelaide in 1166. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 January 1227, and was buried in Doberaner Münster, Bad Doberan, Rostock, East Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Borwin I est né avant 1150, son père, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Wojsława Gryfita, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide en 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1227, et a été enterré à Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich Borwin I vor 1150 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pribislav of Mecklenburg 30 und seine Mutter Wojsława Gryfita 30. Er hat 1166 Adelaide geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Januar 1227 und wurde in Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Borwin I è nato il prima del 1150, il suo padre, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Wojsława Gryfita, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide nel 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 gennaio 1227, e fu sepolto a Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Germania Est.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich Borwin Iが1150年以前に生まれた時，父Pribislav of Mecklenburgは30歳，母Wojsława Gryfitaは30歳であった。1166年にAdelaideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1227年1月28日に死去し，東德ロストッククレイス バド ドバーアンドバーアンエル ムuンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Borwin I(이)가 1150년 이전에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pribislav of Mecklenburg(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Wojsława Gryfita(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1166년 Adelaide(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1227년 1월 28일 사망했으며 동독 로스톡 크레이스 바드 도베란 도베랜어 u스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Borwin I nasceu antes 1150, seu pai, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Wojsława Gryfita, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide em 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1227, e foi sepultado em Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik.

ru.Doberaner Münster, Bad Doberan, Landkrei: добиранир мuнстир, крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Borwin I родился перед 1150 г., его отцу по имени Pribislav of Mecklenburg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Wojsława Gryfita, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide в 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 января 1227 г. и был похоронен в местности добиранир мuнстир, крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия.
